name: Orange-Poppy Seed Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages Cream cheese, softened, 8 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and ginger in a small bowl.
2. Stir in butter with a fork until the mixture forms a crumbly texture.
3. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom and 1-inch up the sides of a lightly greased 9-inch springform pan.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
6. Beat in sugar.
7. Add remaining ingredients (sour cream, poppy seeds, orange extract, vanilla extract, and ginger) and beat until the mixture is smooth.
8. Pour the cheesecake filling into the crust.
9. Bake in an oven preheated to 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until lightly browned on top and almost set.
10. Allow cooling for 1 to 2 hours.
11. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
12. To serve, remove pan sides from the cheesecake.
13. Garnish with whipped cream and orange slices.
14. Cut into wedges.
